landing.hero.tagline: Give Claude or ChatGPT direct access to your Zerodha Kite trading account — with order placement, paper trading, options Greeks, backtesting, Telegram alerts, and 11 pre-trade safety checks.
landing.feature.tools.title: Tools
landing.feature.tools.body: Orders, portfolio, alerts, options chains, analytics, and inline widgets — all exposed as MCP tools.
landing.feature.paper_trading.title: Paper Trading
landing.feature.paper_trading.body: Risk-free simulation mode. Test strategies with virtual orders before committing real capital.
landing.feature.safety.title: Safety Controls
landing.feature.safety.body: 11 pre-trade riskguard checks, elicitation confirmation prompts, and order validation before every trade.
landing.feature.widgets.title: Inline Widgets
landing.feature.widgets.body: Portfolio, activity, orders, and alerts render as interactive HTML widgets inside your chat.
landing.feature.indicators.title: Technical Analysis
landing.feature.indicators.body: RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, and Greeks computed server-side. No libraries needed on the client.
landing.feature.litestream.title: Litestream Backup
landing.feature.litestream.body: Continuous SQLite replication to Cloudflare R2. Your alerts and session data survive restarts.
briefing.morning.greeting: Good morning. Here is your pre-market briefing.
briefing.morning.token_expired: Kite session expired — please re-authenticate before placing orders.
briefing.eod.greeting: Good evening. Here is your end-of-day P&L summary.
riskguard.reason.kill_switch: Trading is currently disabled by the kill switch. Re-enable in /admin/ops to place orders.
riskguard.reason.order_value_limit: Order value exceeds the per-order cap of ₹50,000. Reduce quantity or split into smaller orders.
riskguard.reason.quantity_limit: Order quantity exceeds the per-order limit. Reduce the size or contact admin to raise the limit.
riskguard.reason.daily_order_limit: You have reached the daily order limit (20 orders/day). The counter resets at midnight IST.
riskguard.reason.rate_limit: You are placing orders too quickly (10/min cap). Wait a moment and retry.
riskguard.reason.duplicate_order: An identical order was placed within the last 30 seconds. If this is intentional, wait 30s and retry.
riskguard.reason.daily_value_limit: Today's cumulative order value exceeds the daily cap of ₹2,00,000. Wait until tomorrow or contact admin.
riskguard.reason.auto_freeze: Auto-freeze circuit breaker triggered (consecutive losses). Trading is paused; review your positions before resuming.
riskguard.reason.confirmation_required: This order requires explicit confirmation. Re-issue with confirm=true.
riskguard.reason.off_hours_blocked: Order rejected: outside market hours (NSE: 09:15-15:30 IST). Place orders during regular market hours.
oauth.login.title: Sign In
oauth.login.prompt: Sign in to access your Kite MCP dashboard.
i18n.test.en_only_key: English-only synthetic key for fallback test
